vocabulary.translation: She looks great wearing this item of clothing.
This item of clothing is very cheap.
This item of clothing is a little expensive.
The colour of this item of clothing is very nice.
He gave me a piece of clothing.

vocabulary.english: To look for / To find / To give change
vocabulary.example: 你帮我找一件便宜的吧。
vocabulary.translation: Help me find an inexpensive one.

vocabulary.english: To give (as a present) / To deliver
vocabulary.example: 我想送给朋友一件新衣服。
vocabulary.translation: I want to give a new piece of clothing to my friend as a gift.

vocabulary.english: [used after verb] give it a try / a moment
vocabulary.translation: Let me have a look at this item of clothing.
The clothes sold here are very cheap.
I bought one item of clothing.
Buy this one; it's very cheap.

vocabulary.english: Give to a friend as a gift

phrases.english: Give to a friend as a gift

key_sentences.pinyin: Ná zhè jiàn ba, yán sè hěn hǎo kàn.
key_sentences.english: Take this one; the colour is very nice.

key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè jiàn yī fu guì hái shì pián yi?
key_sentences.english: Is this item of clothing expensive or cheap?

key_sentences.pinyin: Gěi wǒ kàn yí xià zhè jiàn yī fu.
key_sentences.english: Let me have a look at this item of clothing.

key_sentences.chinese: 我想送给朋友一件新衣服。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng sòng gěi péng you yí jiàn xīn yī fu.
key_sentences.english: I want to give a new item of clothing to my friend as a gift.

key_sentences.chinese: 这里卖的衣服颜色很多。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè lǐ mài de yī fu yán sè hěn duō.
key_sentences.english: The clothes sold here come in many colours.

key_sentences.chinese: 买这件吧，穿起来会很快乐！
key_sentences.pinyin: Mǎi zhè jiàn ba, chuān qǐ lái huì hěn kuài lè!
key_sentences.english: Buy this one; you'll feel so happy wearing it!

grammar_points.title: 语气副词「吧」— The Modal Particle ba
grammar_points.explanation: 吧 (ba) is added at the end of a sentence to soften suggestions, give mild commands, or seek confirmation. (1) Suggestion: 我们走吧 (Let's go). (2) Confirmation: 你是小明吧？(You're Xiao Ming, right?). (3) Mild command: 快点儿吧 (Hurry up). It makes sentences less direct and more polite.

examples.pinyin: Ná zhè jiàn ba, yán sè hěn hǎo kàn.
examples.english: Take this one; the colour is very nice.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ men qù mǎi yī fu ba!

exercises.question: What does 吧 do at the end of a sentence?
exercises.correct: Makes a suggestion or seeks confirmation
options: Makes a suggestion or seeks confirmation

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 吧 as a suggestion?
Fill in: 这件颜色好看，你买___。(This colour is nice; you should buy it.)

grammar_points.title: 一下 — Used after a Verb
grammar_points.explanation: 一下 (yí xià) is placed directly after a verb. It softens the request or action, suggesting it is casual, brief, or tentative — like 'give it a try' or 'just for a moment'. Structure: Verb + 一下. It makes commands and requests sound less harsh. Examples: 看一下 (take a look), 试一下 (try it out), 等一下 (wait a moment).

examples.pinyin: Gěi wǒ kàn yí xià zhè jiàn yī fu.
examples.english: Let me have a quick look at this piece of clothing.

examples.chinese: 你穿一下这件，看看合不合适。
examples.pinyin: Nǐ chuān yí xià zhè jiàn, kàn kàn hé bu hé shì.
examples.english: Try on this item and see if it fits.

exercises.question: What does 一下 do when placed after a verb?
exercises.correct: Softens the action, making it brief or casual
options: Softens the action, making it brief or casual

exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 一下?
Fill in: 你帮我找___这件衣服。(Help me look for this item of clothing for a moment.)
What does 试一下 mean?
exercises.correct: Give it a try / Try it on
options: Give it a try / Try it on

grammar_points.title: 给 as Preposition — 'gěi' meaning 'for' or 'to'
grammar_points.explanation: 给 (gěi) can function as a preposition meaning 'for' or 'to (someone)'. Structure: 给 + Person + Verb, or Verb + 给 + Person + Object. Example: 给我看 (show me / let me see); 送给朋友 (give to a friend). As a verb, 给 means 'to give': 给我一件 (give me one item).

examples.chinese: 我想送给朋友一件衣服。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng sòng gěi péng you yí jiàn yī fu.
examples.english: I want to give a piece of clothing to my friend.

examples.pinyin: Gěi wǒ zhǎo yí jiàn pián yi de ba.

exercises.question: What does 给 mean as a preposition?
How do you say 'Give this to me'?
Fill in: 她送___妈妈一件新衣服。(She gave her mother a new piece of clothing as a gift.)
What does 送给朋友 mean?
exercises.correct: Give to a friend as a gift
options: Give to a friend as a gift

exercises.question: How do you say 'give me a look' (let me see it)?

quiz.question: What does 找 mean in a shopping context?
Which sentence means 'Take this one'?
What does 件 mean?
How do you say 'Let me have a look'?
Fill in: 这件衣服___便宜。(This item of clothing is quite cheap.) — choose the best option
What does 颜色 mean?
How do you say 'wear this one'?
What does 颜色好看 mean?
How do you say 'give to a friend as a gift'?
What does 穿起来快乐 mean?
What does 便宜一点儿 mean?
How do you say 'feel happy wearing it'?
Which phrase means 'the colour looks nice'?
Fill in: 我想___给朋友一件衣服，你帮我___一下。(I want to give a piece of clothing to my friend; help me look for one.)

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, zhè jiàn yī fu duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Hello, how much is this item of clothing?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这件两百块，颜色很好看。
lines.pinyin: Zhè jiàn liǎng bǎi kuài, yán sè hěn hǎo kàn.
lines.english: This one is 200 yuan; the colour is very nice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 有点儿贵，有没有便宜一点儿的？
lines.pinyin: Yǒu diǎnr guì, yǒu méi yǒu pián yi yì diǎnr de?
lines.english: It's a little expensive; is there anything cheaper?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有，拿这件吧，一百二，很便宜。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu, ná zhè jiàn ba, yī bǎi èr, hěn pián yi.
lines.english: Yes, take this one; it's 120 yuan, very cheap.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 给我看一下，我想送给朋友。
lines.pinyin: Gěi wǒ kàn yí xià, wǒ xiǎng sòng gěi péng you.
lines.english: Let me have a look; I want to give it to a friend as a gift.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好的，穿起来非常好看，你朋友一定很快乐！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, chuān qǐ lái fēi cháng hǎo kàn, nǐ péng you yí dìng hěn kuài lè!
lines.english: Sure; it looks great when worn; your friend will definitely be very happy!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我想给妈妈买一件衣服，你觉得哪件好？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng gěi māma mǎi yí jiàn yī fu, nǐ jué de nǎ jiàn hǎo?
lines.english: I want to buy my mum a piece of clothing; which one do you think is good?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 拿这件吧，颜色好看，也不贵。
lines.pinyin: Ná zhè jiàn ba, yán sè hǎo kàn, yě bú guì.
lines.english: Take this one; the colour is nice and it's not expensive.

lines.speaker: A
lines.pinyin: Zhè lǐ mài duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much does it sell for here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 九十八，很便宜，我也买一件！
lines.pinyin: Jiǔ shí bā, hěn pián yi, wǒ yě mǎi yí jiàn!
lines.english: Ninety-eight; very cheap — I'll buy one too!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好，我们一起买，送给妈妈，她一定很快乐！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ men yì qǐ mǎi, sòng gěi māma, tā yí dìng hěn kuài lè!
lines.english: Good, we'll buy together and give it to mum — she will definitely be very happy!
